rulings.Case Title: TESHOME T TAREKEGN, VS. FREWWORK ABERRA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Worku Negash'S Motion To Vacate Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 10, 2017 line 1. Defendant Worku Negash'S Motion To Vacate Judgment DENIED.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RED APRON PIZZERIA, LLC VS. SAMER JWEINAT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Red Apron Pizzeria, Llc'S Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 10, 2017 line 2. Plaintiff Red Apron Pizzeria, Llc'S Motion For Summary Adjudication DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b) (Compare Notice of Motion and Separate Statement). The motion for summary adjudication, as framed, fails to completely dispose of the cause of action for declaratory relief. (Compare Notice of Motion 2:17-3:6 and Complaint 10:11-11:9). Finally triable issues of fact exist. (See Plaintiff's Response to Defendant's Separate Statement of Material Facts, including but not limited to facts 3 and 10).= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ISIDORA G. CERALDE ET AL VS. HSBC BANK USA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 10, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs SPECIALIZED LOAN SERVICING, LLC and HSBC BANK USA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to all causes of action for Plaintiffs to (1) join the co-borrower; (2) allege facts giving rise to Plaintiff Ceralde (not party to the contract and not a borrower) standing to bring causes of action arising out the contract and based on statutes; (3) allege facts giving rise to Plaintiffs' statutory claims as owners occupying the Premises as their principal residence; (4) to allege tender or to remove the quiet title claim as to "all persons known or unknown claiming any legal or equitable right, title, estate, lien or interest" which is sought in addition to quieting title as to the named Defendants. The Court notes that "all persons known" may include the original beneficiaries under the Deed of Trust, who are not parties to the action, but are claimed to have engaged in a wrongdoing at origination. To the extent Defendant argues that the causes of action are otherwise insufficiently alleged, the demurrer is overruled. Plaintiffs' causes of action are in part based on the allegations that the Deed of Trust has not been properly assigned to the foreclosing beneficiary due to assignee's execution of the assignment documents. These allegations are sufficient to support causes of action based on them. . Ghuman v. Wells Fargo (2013) 989 F. Supp.2d 994 cited by the moving party is not on point.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FARANAK ALIABADI VS. THE MARGOT S. PARKE LIVING TRUST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 10, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs THE MARGOT S. PARKE LIVING TRUST and DREXEL BRADSHAW's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of the cause of action for Intentional Infliction of Emotional Distress, including but not limited to fact re: intent. Moving party is ordered to complaint with SFRL 2.7B in future. No courtesy copy of the operative complaint was provided.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA J DUTY VS. WALTER K VINSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 10, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT WALTER VINSON's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain.= (501/REQ)
